column1: # manifest-extended.tsv — PLAN ONLY. Nothing here has been moved or linked.
# Extends container/manifest.tsv to cover the literal "ONE folder" ask: the bulky
# per-vendor STATE dirs and the agent BINS, not just the four config slots.
# Governing rule (CLAUDE.md): "names are outputs, not inputs." A bin's identity is its
# package (brew cask/cellar, claude self-updater), NOT its path. So bins are REFERENCED,
# never moved — moving them breaks the manager that owns the path and the symlink gets
# re-clobbered on the next upgrade. State dirs hold live secrets + multi-GB caches, so
# they are SYMLINK-with-verify (cache stays out of git), never copy-into-repo.
# KIND legend:
#   symlink-state-absolute  dir lives in container, OS path becomes an absolute symlink;
#                           copy->verify(rsync+du)->rename(mv -n original to .premigrate)->ln -s; gitignored.
#   reference-only          NOT moved/linked. Recorded in container/state/bins.json (path+
#                           realpath+version+manager) so identity is derivable at use-time.
#   guard-secret            file inside a symlinked state dir that carries a credential; MUST be
#                           gitignored AND only ever backed up to a mountpoint-guarded external volume.
# COLUMN: SLOT  CONTAINER-TARGET  KIND  SIZE  NOTES
# ---- STATE DIRS (the bulk; symlink-with-verify, cache excluded from git) ----
~/.claude
column5: Claude Code state. Contains ~/.claude.json sibling (separate file, also a secret) + settings.json already folded by base manifest. Verify sub-symlink (settings.json) survives the dir move.

column1: ~/.codex
column5: Codex CLI state. logs_2.sqlite alone is ~93M and grows; exclude *.sqlite-wal/-shm from git. auth.json is a secret.

column1: ~/.gemini
column5: NOTE: 8.7G is almost entirely .gemini/antigravity-cli (the agy/antigravity install). The CLAUDE.md base manifest says leave ~/.gemini REAL — folding it conflicts with that and dumps 8.7G onto a 69GiB-free internal disk. RECOMMEND: keep .gemini REAL, or symlink ONLY .gemini/config + .gemini/history (sub-slot), leaving antigravity-cli in place.

column1: ~/.claude.json
column5: Separate from ~/.claude/ dir. Carries account/session data. Gitignore + external-only backup.

column1: # ---- SECRET-BEARING FILES inside the state dirs (flag for gitignore + guard) ----
~/.codex/auth.json
column5: chmod 600. Never into git; external-only backup.

column1: ~/.codex/config.toml
~/.claude/.credentials.json
column2: (if present; not found at scan time)
column5: If it appears later, gitignore it.

column1: # ---- BINS (reference-only; identity = package, derive path at use-time) ----
# Recorded to container/state/bins.json by a (future) inventory step; NOT symlinked.
codex
column5: realpath /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/codex/0.141.0/codex-aarch64-apple-darwin. brew upgrade re-clobbers any symlink. Pin via LIMEN_CODEX_BIN if a fixed path is needed.

column1: agy
column5: /opt/homebrew/bin/agy (Mach-O). Its STATE is the 8.7G ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli above. LIMEN_AGY_BIN to pin.

column1: gemini
column5: node script -> .../@google/gemini-cli/bundle/gemini.js. The 8K is just the launcher; node + bundle are the real payload. LIMEN_GEMINI_BIN to pin.

column1: claude
column5: /Users/4jp/.local/bin/claude -> ~/.local/share/claude/versions/<v>. Self-updater rotates versions/ (2.1.179/181/183 present); a symlink would point at a stale version after update. NEVER move.

column1: jules
opencode
